publishedAbstract: - Installing ODF with 7 nodes, each attached with 10 OSD, for a total of 70 OSD. However, one OSD failed to start, and the StorageCluster status remains "Progressing".- The affected OSD were previously used with ODF and have been reused.- This solution outlines the method to identify the cause of the OSD startup failure.
publishedTitle: ODF installation status remains Progressing and does not complete if osd is reused.
